title: Sum to n
author: Prodipta Acharjee
prompt: Write sum_to(n): return the sum of all whole numbers from 1 to n (so sum_to(3) is 1+2+3 = 6). If n is 0 or negative, return 0. Use a loop - this is what loops are for.
hints: Start a total at 0, then loop and add each number to it.
range(1, n + 1) gives you 1 through n.
total = 0; for i in range(1, n + 1): total += i; return total
